pending_tasks.title: Character sprite pipeline integration
pending_tasks.description: Integrate character_renderer.py into evolution Pipeline. Currently only geometric shapes (coin/star/gem/circle) can be evolved. character_renderer has 5 presets (mario, trickster, simple_enemy, flying_enemy, bouncing_enemy) but is not connected to the evolution loop.

pending_tasks.title: WFC tilemap pipeline integration
pending_tasks.description: WFC module (level/wfc.py) exists and imports correctly. Need to add produce_level() method to AssetPipeline.

pending_tasks.title: Per-frame SDF parameter animation
pending_tasks.description: Each frame can have different SDF parameters for true shape animation.

pending_tasks.title: Multi-state sprite generation
pending_tasks.description: Generate multiple states per character (idle, walk, attack) sharing same palette and style.

pending_tasks.title: Shader pipeline integration
pending_tasks.description: ShaderCodeGenerator (shader/generator.py) exists but needs produce_shader() in Pipeline.

pending_tasks.title: Export pipeline integration
pending_tasks.description: AssetExporter (export/bridge.py) exists but not connected to produce_asset_pack().

pending_tasks.title: Reaction-diffusion textures
pending_tasks.description: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion for organic textures (coral, lichen, biological patterns).

pending_tasks.title: Spring-based secondary animation
pending_tasks.description: Critically-damped spring for follow-through and overlapping action.

pending_tasks.title: Quality checkpoint mid-generation
pending_tasks.description: ArtMathQualityController mid_generation checkpoint not wired into evolution loop.

pending_tasks.description: Partially addressed by P0-NEW-7 adaptive outline width. Full per-segment color/thickness variation still TODO.

pending_tasks.notes: 12 rules distilled manually. Auto-distillation not yet implemented.

completed_tasks.title: Integrate particles + cage deform into pipeline
SDF primitive parameter order fix (all 16 shapes)
Large-scale evolution validation (4 shapes, 120 iters, avg 0.8371)
Full project audit (14-module functional audit + commercial gap analysis)

capability_gaps: RESOLVED-S018: Evaluator too lenient -> 12-metric evaluator with strict thresholds
RESOLVED-S018: CPPN textures too simple -> enriched topology with hidden layers
RESOLVED-S018: No bone-driven deformation -> cage deformation with MVC
RESOLVED-S018: Knowledge base empty -> 12 rules + 10 models registered
RESOLVED-S018: No reference image comparison -> pipeline passes reference/palette
RESOLVED-S019: SDF primitive parameter order bug -> all calls use kwargs
RESOLVED-S019: Palette not constrained -> Floyd-Steinberg dither in OKLAB space
RESOLVED-S019: Particles/cage not in pipeline -> produce_vfx() + produce_deform_animation()
RESOLVED-S019: No validation suite -> 19-test validation, 100% pass
RESOLVED-S020: No multi-layer compositing -> render_sdf_layered() + composite_layers()
RESOLVED-S020: VFX evaluator too harsh -> evaluate_vfx() with rebalanced weights, explosion 0.24→0.66
RESOLVED-S020: Evolution not validated at scale -> 4 shapes, 120 iters, avg 0.8371, all positive trends
RESOLVED-S021: Outline gaps at sharp corners -> adaptive outline width based on curvature
RESOLVED-S021: Texture layer empty in layered rendering -> render_textured_sdf_layered()
RESOLVED-S021: Evolution convergence too slow for complex shapes -> shape-complexity-aware params
REMAINING: No character sprite evolution (character_renderer not in Pipeline)
REMAINING: WFC tilemap not in Pipeline
REMAINING: Shader/Export modules not in Pipeline
REMAINING: No multi-state sprites
REMAINING: No per-frame SDF animation
REMAINING: No reaction-diffusion textures
REMAINING: No spring-based secondary animation

new_features: adaptive_outline parameter for render_sdf() and render_sdf_layered()
_build_texture_func() — Shared texture function builder for flat and layered renderers
Full project audit with 14-module functional testing

quality_improvements.outline_continuity: Adaptive width eliminates gaps at star tips and gem facets
quality_improvements.texture_layers: Layered rendering now produces populated texture layers for all 5 presets
quality_improvements.evolution_efficiency: Simple shapes converge faster, complex shapes get more patience

evolution_history.notes: First real evolution run. Pipeline E2E test successful.
Infrastructure session: evaluator rewrite, CPPN enrichment, particles, cage deform, knowledge base.
Integration + validation session: palette-constrained rendering, pipeline integration, critical parameter bug fix, 19/19 validation pass.
Multi-layer compositing, VFX evaluator tuning, large-scale evolution validation. 4 shapes evolved (coin 0.85, star 0.82, gem 0.81, circle 0.87). 24/24 validation pass.
Adaptive outline width, texture-aware layered rendering, shape-complexity-aware evolution. Full project audit: 14 modules, 10 fully functional. 20/20 validation pass (44/44 cumulative).

sdf_rendering: Inigo Quilez - 2D SDF functions and operations
animation: Thomas & Johnston (1981) - The Illusion of Life (12 Principles)
Lasseter (1987) - Principles of Traditional Animation Applied to 3D
pixel_art: Pixel art dithering: Bayer, Floyd-Steinberg, ordered patterns
OKLAB color space for perceptually uniform color manipulation
session_018_new: Procedural pixel art generation: CPPN+NEAT, WFC, L-systems, reaction-diffusion
Sprite animation math: Verlet particles, Fourier descriptors, cage deformation
Commercial sprite sheet standards (Unity/Godot JSON metadata)

custom_notes.key_insight: SESSION-021 completed all P0 tasks and performed a full project audit. The system's core rendering and evolution engines are production-validated. The biggest remaining gap is character sprite generation — character_renderer.py exists with 5 presets but is not connected to the evolution Pipeline. Four modules (WFC, Shader, Export, Quality) are coded but need Pipeline integration.
custom_notes.next_session_focus: P1-NEW-5 (character sprite pipeline integration), P1-NEW-1 (WFC pipeline integration), P1-NEW-6/7 (Shader/Export pipeline integration). Focus on wiring existing modules into the Pipeline.
custom_notes.anti_duplication: READ DEDUP_REGISTRY.json BEFORE starting any work. All SESSION-018 through SESSION-021 changes are logged there.
custom_notes.parameter_safety: ALL SDF primitive calls MUST use keyword arguments. Never use positional args for circle/box/star/ring/triangle. This is enforced by convention — see SESSION-019 fix.
custom_notes.class_name_reference: ShaderCodeGenerator (not ShaderGenerator), LSystem (not LSystemGenerator), AssetExporter (not ExportBridge), PaletteGenerator.generate(harmony=...) (not scheme=...)
